class.name: BTActionAS_DispatchEvent
class.brief_description: BTAction that dispatches an Ability System event.
class.description: A Behavior Tree action that dispatches an [ASEventTag] via [method ASComponent.dispatch_event]. Uses the native AS Event system (Split Registry Pattern). Returns [constant BT.SUCCESS] immediately after dispatch.

method.name: get_custom_payload
method.description: Returns the custom payload dictionary for the event.

method.name: get_event_tag
method.description: Returns the event tag to dispatch.

method.name: set_custom_payload
method.description: Sets the custom payload dictionary for the event.

method.name: set_event_tag
method.description: Sets the event tag to dispatch. Must be registered as ASTagType::EVENT.
